sections.paragraph:
verb קץ

to loathe, detest, be fed up with; wake up

verb לקצות

to kill; chop off, cut off

verb להקיץ

to wake up, rise; come to an end

verb להקצות

to allocate, allot, appropriate, set aside

verb הוקצה

be allocated, allotted; set aside

masculine noun

end, termination, finish, period, stop, quietus; destruction, ruin
